description: Use this API to retrieve the Scenario options. Note: Scenario settings are not attached to the Scenario file. They are user preferences that are saved on the user’s machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, trackopt, uziprootopt, uziplclpopt, uziplclopt, uziprmtpopt, uziprmtopt = scenariogetopt()
python_syntax: ierr, trackopt, uziprootopt, uziplclpopt, uziplclopt, uziprmtpopt, uziprmtopt = scenariogetopt()

return_values.name: uziprootopt
return_values.description: Setting for conflict resolution for root files. (output).

return_values.name: uziplclpopt
return_values.description: Setting for placement of local files. (output).

return_values.name: uziplclopt
return_values.description: Setting for conflict resolution for local files. (output).

return_values.name: uziprmtpopt
return_values.description: Setting for placement of remote files note: cannot choose to unzip remote files by relative path. (output).

return_values.name: uziprmtopt
return_values.description: Setting for conflict resolution for remote files. (output).

trackopt.description: the user will be prompted as soon as possible when a new file is being tracked.
the user will be prompted about tracked files when the current active group is being closed.
tracked files will be added to the current active group immediately.

uziplclpopt.description: unzip to the same path the file was at before the file was zipped.
unzip to the same path the file was at before, relative to the root path.

uziprmtpopt.description: unzip to the same path the file was at before the file was zipped.
